title: Maximum risk, margin, notional, and leverage policy
description: A team risk percentage is a target capped by market structure and execution limits. A single position must not exceed the hard risk, margin, gross-notional, or leverage limits.
llm_guidance: Treat team risk as a target and never force it. The compiler may reduce actual risk to satisfy the 20% margin, 60% gross-notional, 3x leverage, contract-size, and 5% risk ceilings.
